CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_time DateTime, timezone String);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY, 'Europe/London');
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR, 'Asia/Tokyo');
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (now() + INTERVAL 1 DAY, 'America/New_York');
SELECT toYYYYMMDDhhmmss(event_time, 'UTC') AS utc_time FROM test_dates;
SELECT toYYYYMMDDhhmmss(event_time, timezone) FROM test_dates WHERE event_time > now() - INTERVAL 2 DAY;
SELECT subquery.id, toYYYYMMDDhhmmss(subquery.event_time, subquery.timezone) AS formatted_time FROM (SELECT event_time, timezone FROM test_dates) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE test_results AS SELECT toYYYYMMDDhhmmss(event_time, timezone) AS result FROM test_dates;
SELECT count(*) FROM test_results WHERE result IS NOT NULL;
SELECT toYYYYMMDDhhmmss(event_time, 'America/Los_Angeles') AS la_time, toYYYYMMDDhhmmss(event_time, 'Europe/Paris') AS paris_time FROM test_dates;
WITH (SELECT now()) AS current_time SELECT toYYYYMMDDhhmmss(current_time, 'Asia/Kolkata') AS kolkata_time;
SELECT toYYYYMMDDhhmmss(event_time, timezone) FROM test_dates WHERE timezone IN ('US/Eastern', 'Europe/London') ORDER BY event_time;
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates) AS total_events SELECT toYYYYMMDDhhmmss(event_time, timezone) AS formatted_time, total_events FROM test_dates;
SELECT event_time, toYYYYMMDDhhmmss(event_time + INTERVAL 10 MINUTE, timezone) AS future_time, toYYYYMMDDhhmmss(event_time - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE, timezone) AS past_time FROM test_dates;
SELECT toYYYYMMDDhhmmss(event_time + INTERVAL (index % 5) HOUR, timezone) AS dynamic_time FROM (SELECT event_time, rowNumber() OVER () AS index FROM test_dates) AS subquery;
